---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product, UX, or architecture improvement for ChaosWing
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What analyst or user workflow is currently blocked or awkward?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature and the expected outcome.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user value, engineering value, or product leverage.

## Implementation Notes

Call out any API, graph-model, or design implications you already see.
